title: Crouton Builder — Graduation Plan
subtitle: POC (crouton-builder-demo) → crouton-layout package + builder app
intro: Each card leads with what changed and how to check it on this preview. Tap any behaviour listed under a card for the technical detail (what to expect · the DOM hook · the test). It's derived from the frozen 26-behaviour spec, so the plan can't drift from what we actually agreed.

phases.name: Contract
phases.summary: What changed: the list of behaviours the app must have is locked. From here on, "done" means "matches this list" — not "the build is green".
phases.worksNow: How to check: there's nothing to click — this IS the reference. Read the 26 behaviours in the cards below (tap one to see its test), or open the 🥽 menu → Plan to see this same list in-app.

steps.name: A0 · Freeze spec ledger
steps.test: spec.json has 26 entries; every `settled` entry carries a recorded `signedOff`.

steps.name: A1 · Resolve contradictions
steps.test: No entry contradicts another; superseded entries pruned.

steps.name: A2 · Replace-table (POC fakes → real crouton)
steps.test: Each `stopgap` entry names the real crouton thing that replaces it at graduation.

phases.name: Rebuild the app to satisfy the spec
phases.summary: What changed: the builder is being rebuilt on real crouton pieces so it does everything the locked list says — keeping what the prototype proved, swapping its fakes for the real thing, and adding what it left open.

increments.name: Spine
increments.note: What changed: the skeleton everything hangs off — built on the crouton-layout package, not copied from the prototype.
increments.worksNow: How to check: 1. Open /builder → you get a flow of page cards (the Site). 2. Tap a card → its board opens over REAL Artists / Bookings data. 3. Edit the board and hit Save, then reload → your layout is still there (it persisted to the collection).

increments.name: Canvas & gestures
increments.note: What changed: the board is the prototype's canvas, and the heavy gestures land on it one at a time — so you can check each the moment it ships instead of all at the end.
increments.worksNow: How to check (live now — focus editing): 1. Open a page board. 2. Double-click a card → a full-screen editor opens (device ruler, width slider, live panes over real data). 3. Drag a splitter or pick a variant → the change sticks. 4. Esc or ✕ to leave. Still coming on this card: snap-to-merge, drag-to-detach, pinch-zoom, per-card resize, region pinning.

increments.name: Additions (the app's superset)
increments.note: What changed: nothing yet — these are new abilities the prototype only gestured at. Each ships behind its own review (schema / UI / test), not the side-by-side.
increments.worksNow: How to check: not built yet. Coming: pin a card to the top/bottom of the page, switch a list between rows / cards / table, detach panes nested deep, and save a layout back onto its GitHub ticket.

increments.name: Deferred — the agent⇄human seat
increments.note: What changed: nothing — the AI-arrange + multiplayer seat (#974). It's WHY the clean contract matters, but it's not needed for graduation.
increments.worksNow: How to check: not started. Deferred until after graduation.

phases.name: Prove it — experience side-by-side
phases.summary: What changed: nothing yet — this is the first sign-off. It checks every KEPT behaviour looks and works the same on the prototype and the new app, side by side.
phases.worksNow: How to check: walk each behaviour on both, and reply `lgtm <behaviour-id>` when it matches. It starts per-behaviour as each B2 gesture lands, so you're never waiting for a big-bang at the end.
phases.gate: C1 signed off — a recorded lgtm per kept behaviour (done comes from the sign-off, never from a green build).

phases.name: Prove it — crouton-conformance
phases.summary: What changed: nothing yet — this is the second sign-off. It checks the app is a REAL crouton app under the hood: properly scaffolded, real collections, reusing crouton-layout instead of reinventing it.
phases.worksNow: How to check: a conformance checklist on the PR (frontend + accessibility + e2e + typecheck + structure). Approve it when it's green.
phases.gate: C2 checklist signed off. Graduation promotes ONLY when both C1 and C2 are signed off.
